channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Blocked footpath, 13th April
item.description:
Parked for three weeks blocking pedestrians from using footpath, forcing them to walk in the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catharine Close, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle path, 13th April
item.description:
Cycle paths are full of potholes on Carlton vale making it dangerous to ride esp with deep potholes all over on this street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlton Vale, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in alleyway between Pembury Close and Farleigh Avenue, 13th April
item.description:
There is a large amount of litter in the alleyway that runs beween Pembury Close and Farleigh Avenue. Please would you arrange for all the litter to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembury Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and broken glass in Mounthurst Road, 13th April
item.description:
There is broken glass on the pavement outside 75 Mounthurst Road. Please would you arrange for this to be swept up and removed ASAP. There is a huge amount of litter on the pavement outside 57 Mounthurst Road. Please would you arrange for the litter to be picked up and removed ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mounthurst Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken, uneven paving stones outside 11/13 Farleigh Avenue, 13th April
item.description:
There are broken, uneven paving stones outside 11/13 Farleigh Avenue. Please would you carry out an inspection and arrange for the stones to be removed and replaced with new ones.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chilham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chest of drawers and box, 13th April
item.description:
Left on corner of Pomfret and Flaxman Roads

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Flaxman Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Boughton Avenue, 13th April
item.description:
There is litter on the pavement opposite 27-29 Boughton Avenue. Please would you arrange for this litter to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green BT box in Farleigh Avenue, 13th April
item.description:
There is a large amount of graffiti on the unnumbered green BT box in Farleigh Avenue (towards the junction with Eastry Avenue). This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked/sunken slabs, 13th April
item.description:
A few cracked slabs and one quite sunken. Not very obvious at night if the sign is blocking the view.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in tree pit outside 149 Bourne Vale, 13th April
item.description:
There is litter (including a dog waste bag) in the tree pit outside 149 Bourne Vale. Please would you see that this litter is picked up and removed ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green BT box in Northbourne, 13th April
item.description:
There is graffiti in green BT box number 15403404 in Northbourne. This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartmouth Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large green area next to Marden Avenue needs mowing, 13th April
item.description:
The large green area next to Marden Aveneu (opposite 145-147 Bourne Vale) is overgrown. Please would you arrange for it to be mown as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marden Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: My previos report of litter do not include this photo- and the other one was cropped, 13th April
item.description:
I added 2 photos to my report of constant litter on the corner of Old Kent Rd and Mina Rd but the one of litter has been cropped and photo of the sign from Lewisham Council which I suggested may be more helpful was omitted, so I have added it here. This is an ongoing problem and has not been resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 288, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large grassed area between Wensum Place and Eastway needs cutting, 13th April
item.description:
The large grassed area between Wensum Place and Eastway is overlong and needs cutting. Please would you arrange for it to be mown as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is always litter here, even after it has been cleared, 13th April
item.description:
People are always dumping rubbish on this corner of Old Kent Rd and Mina Rd. There is often broken glass and food left here. The new sign is a start but does not forbid ALL kinds of littering. Perhaps a sign like the one here from Lewisham Council would be more appropriate? Could there be a new litter bin near this spot please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 288, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant rubbish, 13th April
item.description:
This is a continual area for fly tipping. Every day new rubbish appears. It is completely unacceptable and a permanent solution is needed. Cleaner is not always reliable and more could be done.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose, uneven paving stone outside 64 Bourne Vale, 13th April
item.description:
There is a loose, uneven paving stone outside 64 Bourne Vale that is beyond the Council's "trip limit". Please would you arrange for an inspection and then make sure that the stone is secured in place and lies flat again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area of intersection of Blurton Road/Elderfield Rd, 13th April
item.description:
The area of Blurton Road/Elderfield is seeing a lot of rubbish/dog fouling. The road sweeper is not picking up rubbish day to day; items will be left in the same area for days and the cleaners are often seen not working / not acting proactively.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 13th April
item.description:
See pic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Place, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green BT box in Southbourne, 13th April
item.description:
There is graffiti on the unnumbered green BT box next to 1 Southbourne at the junction with Pittsmead Avenue. This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southbourne, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
